<blockquote>With this skill, your dog will warm the hearts of every Villager, '''increasing your reputation'''.</blockquote>

== Trivia ==
[[File:Puppy eyes talent old.gif|thumb|156x156px|Puppy eyes talent (legacy)]]

* It was added in the original DT.
* The talent is heavily nerfed in 1.15.0, <s>due to the cringey dialogues</s>. The Devs have greater plans for the future of this talent.
